steps.title: Map hypothesis to experiment
steps.content: The passage begins with a long-standing hypothesis that Clovis-point spears helped drive woolly mammoths to extinction. It then describes an experiment using a mechanical spear thrower and clay substitutes to test whether those spears could cause enough harm.

steps.title: Focus on the result's effect
steps.content: Choice A adds an ongoing debate the passage does not describe. Choice B focuses on evaluating the method, not the main purpose. Choice C invents two competing hypotheses. The passage describes an experiment whose shallow spear penetration cast doubt on the established hypothesis. The answer is D.
